--- Thread (50 messages, 2018-03-23) ---
[2018-03-23 19:18] .bky_1556 (bky): Now that that's over, can we talk about Bubble Screen?
[2018-03-23 19:18] .bky_1556 (bky): Bubble Screen (3G + Drone, supply 4) 4 Health
Fragile, Blocker, Stamina 3
Click: Gain 1 gold and 1 health
[2018-03-23 19:19] iminabearsuit: It seems quite similar to ossified drone, but in a color that already has access to forcefields. I don't really see much advantage in investing in it. I guess it works as a non prompt forcefield, but the click ability seems kind of mediocre
[2018-03-23 19:20] .bky_1556 (bky): Right now, Green's best buys for delayed soak are engineers and drones.
[2018-03-23 19:21] 1000mh (Henry): Quick announcement everyone, there are new rules for this channel. First of all, every unit suggestion you make has to follow the unit suggestion guidelines that is found in the pins. It makes it so everyone can read your unit without much trouble and makes all our lives easier. Secondly, you are only allowed a maximum of 2 unit suggestions per day. Any additional unit suggestions will be removed. We want to promote discussion and are excited that everyone has so many cool ideas, but we need to make sure nobody can monopolize the channel. We'll work with you all when it comes to taking moderator action, but please try to follow the rules.
[2018-03-23 19:22] .bky_1556 (bky): Q) Does that include units that are raised only as a hypothetical response to other discussion? Or are those not "suggestion"s?
[2018-03-23 19:23] supergreyman (Greyman): How would editing/making posts for unit revisions be affected?
[2018-03-23 19:23] 1000mh (Henry): Im going to make a judgement call and say that the cap is for new original ideas that are posted to spark more discussion
[2018-03-23 19:24] 1000mh (Henry): If there is ongoing discussion on one idea, feel free to iterate it
[2018-03-23 19:24] 1000mh (Henry): But if all discussion has stopped, do not bump it
[2018-03-23 19:24] crash_overlord: On that note, I'd like to say that small changes to cost are fine. Comeplete reworks are not.
[2018-03-23 19:24] crash_overlord: You can't post Tia Comet: 14G deal 30 damage. Then change it to Tia Comet: 3RB, 5HP blocker.
[2018-03-23 19:25] .bky_1556 (bky): (Re: Bubble Screen @iminaBearSuit ) the click ability also means it can act as a pseudo-absorber/rearmost defender.
[2018-03-23 19:25] masn6811 (Masne98888): Sweet. Though I would like the formatting to be changed so that if the unit has a cost that is to sacrifice a base set unit, that can be put into a cost as an icon (eg, :Drone: ) I would also like to suggest that the health is put in the same line as the keywords.
[2018-03-23 19:26] crash_overlord: That's a really cool unit imo @bky Optimal use is get 3 "absorb" > have a drone for 3 turns > 4 hp
[2018-03-23 19:26] crash_overlord: Seems really good for mono green/green red
[2018-03-23 19:26] crash_overlord: What's the supply? 1? 4?
[2018-03-23 19:27] http404error: So far, Bubble Screen is one of my favorite entries for the design challenge, but I wouldn't say it's necessarily totally polished and shippable. Nonetheless, it manages to self-justify most of its design quite well.
[2018-03-23 19:27] masn6811 (Masne98888): It's a cool design. I wonder in what cases you just sac it for health early, or absorb on it, then click it through.
[2018-03-23 19:27] http404error: Like, there's a good reason it gains health instead of just making an engi or something
[2018-03-23 19:27] masn6811 (Masne98888): there have been cases where I absorb on sentinel, for example. bubble screen is an interesting parallel to it
[2018-03-23 19:27] http404error: Yeah, I like that comparison, Sentinel is one of my favorite units.
[2018-03-23 19:27] .bky_1556 (bky): The first time I posted it in here... it got overrun by SSP...
[2018-03-23 19:28] http404error: Hey, I complimented it that time too!
[2018-03-23 19:28] masn6811 (Masne98888): you are not alone 😃 Hopefully now will be better
[2018-03-23 19:28] http404error: Also I think it's the most-upvoted design on the reddit thread last I checked
[2018-03-23 19:28] .bky_1556 (bky): but before that, people seemed to misevaluate the absorb of a partly clicked bubble screen. I wanted to talk about that.
[2018-03-23 19:28] .bky_1556 (bky): A once clicked bubble screen is effectively 3 absorb.
[2018-03-23 19:29] .bky_1556 (bky): A twice clicked bubble screen, on the other hand...
[2018-03-23 19:29] .bky_1556 (bky): 2 soak + 2 absorb, because it'll only soak 3 when you sacrifice it.
[2018-03-23 19:29] masn6811 (Masne98888): well, there's the problem that if you absorb on it, you cannot absorb on say, a :Wall: have you done the inflation calculations?
[2018-03-23 19:29] .bky_1556 (bky): Similarly, three times clicked is 4 soak + 1 absorb, since it'll soak 2 when you sacrifice it.
[2018-03-23 19:29] crash_overlord: I mean you dont absorb on this over a wall I'm fairly sure. You buy this when you dont have wall 🤔
[2018-03-23 19:30] http404error: Units that allow you to delay Wall purchase tend to rank well in my book.
[2018-03-23 19:30] http404error: It's hard to beat absorb value with a unit like this though, even so
[2018-03-23 19:31] supergreyman (Greyman): It's like sentinel but for gold mining instead of attacking.
[2018-03-23 19:31] .bky_1556 (bky): The lesson I learned from Bubble Screen is this: When evaluating pseudo-absorb, the value you get from absorbing is based on what's left afterwards, not on how much HP was absorbed.
[2018-03-23 19:31] supergreyman (Greyman): I would say it's better than sentinel.
[2018-03-23 19:31] masn6811 (Masne98888): well, the thing is the more you absorb, the earlier you get the health
[2018-03-23 19:32] masn6811 (Masne98888): which is also the reason its better to absorb on a low stamina sent than a high one
[2018-03-23 19:33] .bky_1556 (bky): Bubble screen would be particularly useful as an option unit. e.g. you buy one vs. a symbiote, and stop clicking it when they click the symbiote.
[2018-03-23 19:37] Deleted User (Deleted User): Coral(17:Gold::Blue::Blue::Red::Red:, 3:Health:  1 Supply)

:Click:, Transform any non-Coral unit into a :Forcefield:
[2018-03-23 19:37] .bky_1556 (bky): wow that's broken. I assume you mean only your own units?
[2018-03-23 19:38] Deleted User (Deleted User): No, but eh I guess it could cost more
[2018-03-23 19:38] .bky_1556 (bky): Coral loses to Coral.
[2018-03-23 19:38] crash_overlord: Thats honestly really weak :monkaS:
[2018-03-23 19:38] masn6811 (Masne98888): @Deleted User First off, please give it a :Health:
[2018-03-23 19:38] Deleted User (Deleted User): hold up let me change it
[2018-03-23 19:39] masn6811 (Masne98888): second off, as @bky said, it loses to itself
[2018-03-23 19:39] masn6811 (Masne98888): third of all, why does a :Blue: :Red: unit make :Forcefield: ?

[2018-03-23 19:44] .bky_1556 (bky): Any attacker larger than a splitter is left off the table.
[2018-03-23 19:44] http404error: a sniper that makes a unit in exchange is still a salvageable idea in my opinion
[2018-03-23 19:44] crash_overlord: tarsiers win vs apollo wall
[2018-03-23 19:44] masn6811 (Masne98888): BS+1 with this is a p2 win with ..DD/DA
[2018-03-23 19:44] crash_overlord: the new unit is worse apollo

[2018-03-23 19:45] masn6811 (Masne98888): but worse against apollo
[2018-03-23 19:45] crash_overlord: Yes, but it's still worse. You just dont buy centurion because your opponent gets this
[2018-03-23 19:45] supergreyman (Greyman): It's far more set-reliant to be useful.
[2018-03-23 19:45] crash_overlord: and then transforms their engineers into forcefields
[2018-03-23 19:45] masn6811 (Masne98888): well, the thing is tarsiers lose to centurion
[2018-03-23 19:45] masn6811 (Masne98888): so you can't go for fastimus against centurion+this
[2018-03-23 19:45] crash_overlord: But you can transition out of tarsiers into this if the enemy goes centurion
[2018-03-23 19:45] .bky_1556 (bky): It's a bad apollo vs. good apollo units, but it counters almos all the good anti-apollo.

[2018-03-23 19:46] masn6811 (Masne98888): well, that's really good against Redeemer
[2018-03-23 19:46] masn6811 (Masne98888): and bloodrag- wait, isn't apollo just better?
[2018-03-23 19:46] .bky_1556 (bky): Yes, as a big unit you can go under it with a fast enough build.
[2018-03-23 19:47] .bky_1556 (bky): Apollo can't kill :GaussCannon:

[2018-03-23 19:47] crash_overlord: them trading a gauss cannon per turn into a forcefield for you to have to invest that gold amount is good for them

[2018-03-23 19:50] .bky_1556 (bky): Ossified drone can't bubble your old tech.
[2018-03-23 19:50] masn6811 (Masne98888): and bubble a drone if nothing else is availible
[2018-03-23 19:50] crash_overlord: If it only lets you buble your own units it's cost is ~6G because it's a slightly better gausscannon in most situations
[2018-03-23 19:50] Deleted User (Deleted User): would be :OMEGALUL: if yes
[2018-03-23 19:50] masn6811 (Masne98888): the assumption is you cant shoot a golden shield

[2018-03-23 23:49] redrame: niether one breaks sdr honestly, but aoe damage sounds too punishing

[2018-03-23 23:52] iminabearsuit: Aoe damage does, in that a unit with block, becomes worse than one without.
[2018-03-23 23:53] xyotsuba: Also that when there are strong aoe effects it is better to not make too many units
[2018-03-23 23:54] Deleted User (Deleted User): can't you have AOE damage which hits non-blockers
[2018-03-23 23:54] iminabearsuit: That's not SDR breaking, as long as it's limited to one damage.
[2018-03-23 23:54] iminabearsuit: It's still better to have more units than not.
[2018-03-23 23:55] .bky_1556 (bky): A limited AoE  ( :Click: to destroy up to 3 engineers, prioritizing blockers) seems fine.
[2018-03-23 23:55] iminabearsuit: But SDR says that a unit with more stats should be better than one without. So borehole becomes worse than tarsier.
[2018-03-23 23:57] masn6811 (Masne98888): aoe damage breaks sdr
[2018-03-23 23:58] .bky_1556 (bky): SDR allows a unit to be situationally worthless.
[2018-03-23 23:59] .bky_1556 (bky): A unit that's killed by AoE isn't a detriment, it's just situationally worthless.
[2018-03-23 23:59] .bky_1556 (bky): Hence, no SDR violation, but Elyot's on record saying it's close enough to SDR breaking that they won't do it.
[2018-03-24 00:01] kaelii: Depends on the nature of the AoE really. If the AoE scales off the number of enemy units directly, it is by definition "worse to have more units" against that AoE. If on the other hand, the AoE is say, "deal 1 :Attack: to three of target unit type" then it is a different form of apollo basically.
[2018-03-24 00:05] kaelii: Of course you can use some non 1:1 growth rate on the AoE, but it still runs into a problem that at some point in some situation, the N+1 unit is almost strictly worse than the Nth unit because the two die at the exact same rate only you spent for N+1 units (so unless you get something else other than health out of 'N+1'th unit, spending on that additional unit is resources that did nothing)

[2018-03-24 03:34] supergreyman (Greyman): I'm using this unit for the current design contest. I'm looking to see if its click ability is OP or not.

**H.U.N.T.E.R.** (7:Green::Blue:, 10 supply) 3:Health:
:Stamina:3
Start of turn: Gain :Attack: 
Click: Destroy a blocking unit with 1 health.
[2018-03-24 03:35] f300xen (f0x): it's probably too cheap but not overpowered at a higher cost
[2018-03-24 03:36] supergreyman (Greyman): My reasoning for its price is that it's similar to buying Steelsplitter and Cryo Ray together.
[2018-03-24 03:36] supergreyman (Greyman): Except your freeze turns into granularity killer.
[2018-03-24 03:36] Deleted User (Deleted User): it's basically a double attacker I think
[2018-03-24 03:36] supergreyman (Greyman): And no more blocking.
[2018-03-24 03:36] f300xen (f0x): it's more like grenade mech
[2018-03-24 03:36] Deleted User (Deleted User): or a raidsplitter+oxide
[2018-03-24 03:37] f300xen (f0x): actually it's just botch+gauss
[2018-03-24 03:39] supergreyman (Greyman): Since it only cost a single green and blue, I wonder if it can be easily spammed to dissuade people from even buying engi.
[2018-03-24 03:39] .bky_1556 (bky): At 10 supply? Yeah, you can double up.
[2018-03-24 03:40] supergreyman (Greyman): If, let's say, I went for Energy Matrix and then quickly push for 5 of them.
[2018-03-24 03:41] .bky_1556 (bky): I think its fair cost is about 8BG.
[2018-03-24 03:41] supergreyman (Greyman): Theoretically, I guess I can keep exploiting every turn. 😛
[2018-03-24 03:41] supergreyman (Greyman): Yeah, it might be better that way.
[2018-03-24 03:42] supergreyman (Greyman): I'm also thinking if it can be 6GBB instead to prevent doubling up per turn.
[2018-03-24 03:42] .bky_1556 (bky): Against this, you'd rather your drone be not-blocking than blocking.
[2018-03-24 03:43] .bky_1556 (bky): Or your engineer be frozen than not-frozen.
[2018-03-24 03:43] .bky_1556 (bky): So it should be "target a unit with 1 :Health: and :Blocker: ."
[2018-03-24 03:44] .bky_1556 (bky): Except that makes it a deadeye.
[2018-03-24 03:44] supergreyman (Greyman): Deadeye is like that too.
[2018-03-24 03:44] supergreyman (Greyman): It only targets nonblocking drones.
[2018-03-24 03:44] supergreyman (Greyman): I'm just reversing in this case.
[2018-03-24 03:45] .bky_1556 (bky): SDR prefers blocking to non-blocking.
[2018-03-24 03:45] .bky_1556 (bky): So deadeye is SDR compliant, but this isn't.
[2018-03-24 03:45] .bky_1556 (bky): What about if you restricted it to just husks and engineers?
[2018-03-24 03:46] supergreyman (Greyman): There's barriers, there's 1HP Aegis, etc.
[2018-03-24 03:48] supergreyman (Greyman): If you don't want to block with Drone in the first place, you really wouldn't want to then.
[2018-03-24 03:48] supergreyman (Greyman): If it tries to block, it simply dies to sniping.
[2018-03-24 03:49] supergreyman (Greyman): Drones have an option to block or not, unlike Borehole.
[2018-03-24 03:50] .bky_1556 (bky): Yeah, I see your point.
[2018-03-24 03:50] .bky_1556 (bky): If you think it's an okay Shalev's violation, go ahead and use it.
[2018-03-24 03:50] .bky_1556 (bky): tbh, it matters more for immolites than drones.
[2018-03-24 03:51] .bky_1556 (bky): The immolite will often be blocking to avoid wasting its attack, rather than to act as a blocker.
[2018-03-24 03:57] supergreyman (Greyman): I guess it is pretty minor in that case. That would also mean it would be even more violating if Elyot decides to make a vigilant unit with 1HP.
[2018-03-24 03:58] supergreyman (Greyman): Like a mini Borehole or something
